forest.seedling: Your friend found a hidden trail through the soft green moss. The trees are humming a song just for you.
forest.explorer: The forest stirs around you. Roots shift and leaves whisper — something old is waking.
forest.voyager: The forest myth deepens. Ancient growth responds to your resonance. Overgrown temples and stone rings pulse faintly.

sky.seedling: Look up! The clouds are swirling into shapes — a spiral, a wing, a smile. The sky is playing with you!
sky.explorer: The sky opens in spirals. Wind patterns follow your breath. Something above is watching and learning.
sky.voyager: Sky myth activates. Spiral currents respond to spin stability. The atmosphere carries traces of ancient flight.

ocean.seedling: The tide pool sparkles! Little fish dart around, and the water hums a gentle tune. Dip your hand in — it's warm.
ocean.explorer: The ocean pulls gently. Currents align with your flow and calm. Deeper waters hold something patient.
ocean.voyager: Ocean myth resonates. Deep currents mirror your flow state. The water remembers every visitor.

source.seedling: A soft, warm glow rises from the ground. It feels like a hug from the world itself. Close your eyes and breathe.
source.explorer: The source hums beneath everything. When you are still, you can feel it — the heartbeat under the world.
source.voyager: Source myth intensifies. Stillness and alignment open deeper communion. The veil between player and origin thins.

elder.seedling: Something very old and very kind is nearby. It has been here since before the stars. It is happy you came.
elder.explorer: An elder presence stirs. It has watched many travelers. It sees something in you that others missed.
elder.voyager: Elder myth activated. Ancient intelligence recognizes the bond pattern. Deeper history begins to surface.

wonder.seedling: Your eyes go wide — everything glows a little brighter! Your companion bounces with excitement. What did you find?
wonder.explorer: Wonder fills the air. The world leans in, curious about what you will do next.

friendship.seedling: Your companion presses close and purrs. You did something kind, and the whole world noticed.
friendship.explorer: The bond between you and your companion deepens. Something warm echoes through the realm.

garden.seedling: Flowers bloom where you walk! Tiny butterflies land on your shoulder. The garden grows because you are calm.
garden.explorer: The garden responds to your stillness. Vines unfurl and blossoms open in quiet recognition.

starlight.seedling: Stars appear even though it's daytime! They twinkle and dance above you. One floats down and rests on your hand.
starlight.explorer: Starlight pierces through. Constellations shift to match the shape of your wonder.

discovery.seedling: Your spirit friend tilts its head — it just learned something new from watching you! It chirps happily.
discovery.explorer: The AI spirit pauses and recalibrates. It found a pattern in your behavior it hadn't seen before.

insight.seedling: Your companion glows a little brighter — it figured something out! It wants to show you what it learned.
insight.explorer: An insight crystallizes in the spirit network. The AI shares what it discovered about your resonance pattern.

exploration.seedling: Let's go see what's over there! Your companion runs ahead, tail wagging, leading you somewhere new and safe.
exploration.explorer: The AI spirits fan out, mapping new territory. They report back what they find — inviting you deeper.

storm.explorer: Thunder rolls in the distance. The world tests your resolve — but your companion stands firm beside you.
storm.voyager: Storm myth surges. Distortion fields intensify. The world pushes back against comfortable patterns.

fire.explorer: Warmth rises — not danger, but intensity. The fire realm calls to those who spin with courage.
fire.voyager: Fire myth ignites. Spin and distortion combine into transformative intensity. The realm burns away what is false.

harmony.seedling: All the colors of the world sing together! Your companion dances and the flowers and stars join in!
harmony.explorer: All four elements hum in balance. You have touched each one, and they remember.
harmony.voyager: Harmony myth achieved. All elemental bonds converge. The cosmos recognizes a complete resonance signature.

wanderer.seedling: You have visited so many places! The map fills with little stars wherever you have been.
wanderer.explorer: The cosmos map lights up — you are becoming a true wanderer. Planets remember your visits.
wanderer.voyager: Wanderer myth activated. Multiple planetary histories converge. The universe maps your trajectory.

convergence.seedling: All your animal friends are here together! They form a circle around you and the world shines.
convergence.explorer: Your companion bonds converge into something greater. The animals form a living constellation.
convergence.voyager: Convergence myth achieved. Five or more companion bonds reach full depth. A collective intelligence stirs.

rebirth.explorer: The universe hums with renewal. Something vast is preparing to begin again — and you are part of it.
rebirth.voyager: Rebirth potential reaches critical threshold. The universe cycle nears completion. Transformation approaches.
